proRescue.title: You have Pro — make your first scan
proRescue.body: Photograph any train, or pick a photo from your gallery, to scan your first train.

scan.title: LocoSnap
scan.signUpPrompt: Create a free account to save your collection
scan.noTrainFound: Could not identify a train. Try a clearer photo.
scan.cameraPermission: Camera access is needed to scan trains.

persistent.title: Go Pro — unlimited scans
persistent.body_one: {{remaining}} free scan left. Pro unlocks every train you see.
persistent.body_other: {{remaining}} free scans left. Pro unlocks every train you see.

locked.title: Free scans used
locked.body: Go Pro to keep scanning — unlimited spots, full specs, every blueprint.

scanningGuide.title: Tips for a clean scan
scanningGuide.tip1: Frame the whole train square-on — get the cab and bodyside in.
scanningGuide.tip2: Shoot in good light; avoid glare, deep shadow and backlighting.
scanningGuide.tip3: Keep it sharp and close enough to read the number or livery.

hourlyCap.pro: Whoa, speed scanner! Your Pro access is unlimited — this is just a short anti-spam pause. Try again in a few minutes.
hourlyCap.free: You're scanning quickly! Please wait a few minutes before your next scan.

pickerError.title: Couldn't open the photo library
pickerError.body: Your phone wouldn't let us open the gallery just now. Take a photo with the camera instead?

scan.heroSubtitle:
Point your camera or choose a photo
to unlock specs, facts & rarity

lowConfidence.title: Hmm, this one's tricky
lowConfidence.body: We're not fully sure about this photo. Try another angle for a sharper read?

wrongId.loggedBody: Your report helps LocoSnap get better at identifying this kind of train.
wrongId.correctedSpecsNote: You corrected this card — specs and facts aren't shown for manual corrections yet.

verification.unverifiedHelp: This photo lacks the metadata we use to verify a sighting (no GPS, EXIF stripped, or implausible date). It's saved to your collection but won't count for League XP and won't appear in the public feed.
verification.promoteConfirmBody: By tapping confirm you're stating you took this photo yourself. The spot will become visible in the public feed (no League XP).
verification.promoteFailed: Could not promote — please try again later

featured.failed: Couldn't update featured card — try again later

expiring.title: Your Pro is ending soon
expiring.body_one: {{days}} day left. Tap to renew and keep unlimited scans.
expiring.body_other: {{days}} days left. Tap to renew and keep unlimited scans.

winback.title: Welcome back — claim 1 year of Pro
winback.body: {{price}} for the first year, then renews at the regular annual price. Cancel anytime.

countryBanner.title: Add your country flag
countryBanner.body: Pick your country to join the country leaderboard.

errors.tooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.tooLong: Username must be 20 characters or less
errors.generic: Could not update username. Please try again.

history.title: Collection
history.empty: No trains scanned yet. Get out there!

proUpsell.title: Climb the leaderboard faster
proUpsell.body: Pro gives you unlimited scans — every spot you catch counts toward your rank.

league.signInPrompt: Sign in to join your league.
league.notReady: Your league spot will appear after your first scan.
league.empty: No spotters in your league yet — be the first to score XP this week.

about.title: How this works
about.intro: This tab ranks spotters by the XP they've earned this week — it resets every Sunday at midnight UTC.
about.earnBody: Every train you scan earns XP. Rarer trains earn more. First-time scans of a class double your XP.
about.tiersBody: Top 5 each week get promoted, bottom 5 get demoted. The other tabs (Country, Collection) rank by total spots and unique classes instead — no weekly reset.

country.empty: No spotters in this country yet.

collection.streakSoon: Streak ranking ships in v1.0.27 — showing unique classes for now.
collection.empty: No spotters yet — be the first.

scoring.banner: How is my score worked out?
scoring.bannerWithTotal: How is my score of {{total}} worked out?
scoring.title: How your rarity score works
scoring.intro: Your rarity score rewards rarer finds — only Rare and above count towards it.
scoring.notCounted: Common and Uncommon finds don't add to this score.
scoring.empty: Scan a Rare, Epic or Legendary train to start your score.

freeze.title: Streak freezes
freeze.body: Freezes protect your league spot when you can't scan. They auto-burn at week close. Pro: +1 every week (max 3). Free: +1 after 4 active weeks (max 2).

themedDay.rare_tier: Rare-Tier Tuesday — {{multiplier}}× XP for rare and above today
themedDay.heritage: Heritage Saturday — {{multiplier}}× XP for your country's classes today

boost.heading: Boost cards
boost.confirmBody: Adds 100 XP to your weekly total immediately. This action can't be undone.
boost.applyFailed: Couldn't apply card — try again later
boost.notReadyBody: This card type ships in v1.0.27.

flat_100.title: +100 XP
flat_100.description: Earned by promoting out of a league

next_scan_2x.title: 2× next scan
next_scan_2x.description: Earned by 4 active weeks in a row

auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a sign-in link.
auth.freeAccountPerks: Save your collection, earn XP, climb the leaderboard.

paywall.title: Go Pro
paywall.heroSubtitle: Take your trainspotting to the next level
paywall.wallSubtitle: Your 3 lifetime scans are spent. Pro keeps every scan unlimited.
paywall.fundedTrust: Funded by subscriptions, not ads or data
paywall.signInGateBody: Your Pro stays with your account, not your device. Sign in once with email — your subscription works on any phone you sign into.

unlimitedScans.label: Unlimited scans
unlimitedScans.desc: No more waiting — scan every train you see

collection.label: Your whole collection
collection.desc: Every train you've ever spotted, always accessible

blueprints.label: Premium technical blueprints
blueprints.desc: Detailed engineering diagrams for your collection

scan_2.title: Try Pro from just £1/month
scan_2.body: Special intro for new subscribers. Full specs, blueprints, your whole collection.

scan_4.title: Never lose a spot again
scan_4.body: Your full collection, every spec, every blueprint. Special intro pricing available.

scan_5.title: 1 free scan left
scan_5.body: Keep scanning every train you see — go Pro to continue without limits.

scan_6.title: Free scans used
scan_6.body: Go Pro to keep scanning — unlimited spots, full specs, every blueprint.

paywall.pendingBody: Your payment is being processed. You'll get access as soon as it clears — no need to buy again.

radar.subtitle: Communal hotspots where the community has spotted trains. Areas with rarer finds glow hotter.
radar.empty: No communal hotspots yet. Areas appear here once at least two spotters share them.
radar.signInTitle: Sign in to explore Train Radar
radar.signInBody: Train Radar shows the community's spotting hotspots — where rare and common trains turn up. Sign in to explore the map.

errors.networkError: Could not connect to LocoSnap servers. Please try again.
errors.timeout: Request timed out. Please check your connection.
errors.highDemand: LocoSnap is experiencing high demand. Please try again in a moment.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

languagePicker.title: Choose your language
languagePicker.subtitle: You can change this later in your profile.

onboardingIdentity.welcomeBody: We've added country flags, achievements, and a new leaderboard. Set up your identity in 30 seconds.
onboardingIdentity.emojiProSubtitle: Unlock more options with LocoSnap Pro.
onboardingIdentity.emojiProLockBody: This emoji is exclusive to LocoSnap Pro. You can pick a free emoji for now and upgrade any time.
onboardingIdentity.emailTitle: Save your spots and join the leaderboard
onboardingIdentity.emailSubtitle: We'll email you a code. No password needed.
onboardingIdentity.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

identityModal.title: Edit identity
identityModal.subtitle: Pick your country flag and spotter emoji.
identityModal.addAccount: Add account to sync across devices
identityModal.publicHelper: Others can see your classes & rarity — never your location.

spotter.title: Spotter
spotter.empty: No spots in this collection yet.
spotter.error: Couldn't load this collection. Try again later.
